name: sequential-thinking
description: Structured problem-solving and planning through sequential reasoning
use_cases: Breaking down complex problems into steps
setup_instructions: No API keys required. This MCP helps structure thinking and problem-solving approaches.
example_prompts: Break down the implementation of a real-time chat system
Plan the migration from monolith to microservices
Analyze the trade-offs of different database choices
Create a step-by-step debugging plan for this performance issue
usage_tips: Use for complex problems that need systematic analysis
Helpful when feeling overwhelmed by project scope
